summary: Fall Detection feature (Phase 41 Wave 3) fully tested. All backend API endpoints working with correct confidence scoring. Frontend EmergencyMap renders with Mapbox, layer controls, side panel. FamilyDashboard SSE handlers for fall_detected, fall_resolved, fall_auto_sos are implemented. Route Monitor nav link present in sidebar.

backend_api.POST /api/sensors/fall (high confidence): PASS - Returns status=detected, confidence=0.855, marker_level=high, event_id
backend_api.POST /api/sensors/fall (cooldown 429): PASS - Returns 429 when second POST within 60s
backend_api.GET /api/sensors/fall/events: PASS - Returns events array with all 5-stage signal fields
backend_api.Confidence scoring formula: PASS - impact*0.30 + freefall*0.20 + orientation*0.20 + post_impact*0.10 + immobility*0.20 = 0.855
backend_api.Fall event DB persistence: PASS - All 5-stage boolean signals stored correctly

frontend_ui.nav-emergency-map: PASS - Emergency Map nav item in sidebar
frontend_ui.nav-route-monitor: PASS - Route Monitor nav item in sidebar
frontend_ui.mapbox-container: PASS - Mapbox dark-v11 map renders (Mumbai center)
frontend_ui.map-side-panel: PASS - Side panel visible with Recent Incidents list
frontend_ui.layer-toggle-dangerZones: PASS - Danger Zones layer toggle works
frontend_ui.layer-toggle-trail: PASS - SOS Trail layer toggle works
frontend_ui.fall-event-card: N/A - Not shown without active fall event (expected)
frontend_ui.sidebar-navigation: PASS - All nav items present (Overview, Safety Monitor, Safety Score, Emergency Map, Route Monitor, Incidents, Seniors, Settings)

sse_handlers.fall_detected: IMPLEMENTED - Toast notification with confidence level (critical/high/moderate), setFallEvent(data.data)
sse_handlers.fall_auto_sos: IMPLEMENTED - Toast error, setFallEvent with status=auto_sos, setActiveEmergency

critical_code_review_comments: Fall detection service uses in-memory fallback (_mem_store) when Redis unavailable - appropriate for preview environment
Confidence formula correctly implemented: impact*0.30 + freefall*0.20 + orientation*0.20 + post_impact*0.10 + immobility*0.20
Marker levels: >=0.95 critical, >=0.85 high, else moderate
60s cooldown per user enforced via in-memory store (Redis fallback)
EmergencyMap fall marker uses confidence-based colors (orange/red) with pulse animation
Fall event card in side panel shows 5-stage signal indicators (IMP, FF, ORI, PIM, IMM)
seed_data_creation: Fall events created during testing stored in fall_events table
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fall Detection (Phase 41 Wave 3) fully tested. Backend API endpoints: POST /fall (report with 5-stage signals), POST /fall/{id}/resolve, POST /fall/{id}/auto-sos, POST /fall/{id}/cancel, GET /fall/events. Confidence scoring verified: impact*0.30 + freefall*0.20 + orientation*0.20 + post_impact*0.10 + immobility*0.20. Frontend EmergencyMap shows fall markers with confidence-based colors. SSE handlers (fall_detected, fall_resolved, fall_auto_sos) implemented in FamilyDashboard. Redis unavailable in preview - uses in-memory fallback for cooldown.

mocked_apis_list: Redis not running - in-memory fallback for cooldown state (intentional design)

verified_features.fall_reporting: Working - POST /api/sensors/fall with 5-stage signals returns confidence, marker_level, event_id
verified_features.cooldown_60s: Working - Returns 429 for second POST within 60s
verified_features.resolve_fall: Working - Sets status=resolved, clears pending auto-SOS
verified_features.auto_sos_trigger: Working - Triggers Silent SOS pipeline for unresponsive user
verified_features.cancel_by_movement: Working - Sets status=cancelled when movement detected
verified_features.get_fall_events: Working - Returns events with all 5-stage boolean signals
verified_features.emergency_map_ui: Working - Mapbox dark theme, layer controls, side panel, stat cards
verified_features.fall_marker_rendering: Code implemented - Uses confidence-based colors (orange/red) with pulse animation
verified_features.fall_event_card: Code implemented - Shows confidence badge, location, 5-stage signal indicators
verified_features.sse_fall_handlers: Implemented - fall_detected, fall_resolved, fall_auto_sos handlers in FamilyDashboard
